front: Novel: set in the fictional city of Zenith in the state of Winnemac; protagonist is a middle-class realtor and 'Solid Citizen'
Novel: protagonist's friend Paul Riesling is imprisoned for shooting his wife Zilla
Novel: protagonist has affair with Tanis Judique but breaks it off when his wife Myra falls ill
Novel: Carol Kennicott attempts to reform the small town of Gopher Prairie, inspired by the author's birthplace of Sauk Centre
Novel: Carol calls her newborn 'a bomb to blow up smugness' after a lukewarm response to her Community Day proposal
Novel: the Thanatopsis Club cancels a production of Shaw's Androcles and the Lion because Raymie Witherspoon objects
Novel: an idealistic doctor travels to a Caribbean island to administer a bacteriophage against a plague outbreak
Author: declined the Pulitzer Prize, saying 'every compulsion is put upon writers to become safe, polite, obedient, and sterile'
Novel: Sam tours Europe after selling the Revelation Motor Company; wife Fran pursues Kurt von Obersdorf; Sam meets widow Edith Cortright in Venice
Novel: President Buzz Windrip runs a fascist 'Corpo' government; Doremus Jessup writes editorials for The Vermont Vigilance
Novel: a banker discovers he is one-sixty-fourth black; based on NAACP leader Walter White
